title: hieracium transiens subsp. autranii
intro: Hieracium transiens subsp. autranii, also known as Hieracium autranii, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Hieracium autranii include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal use, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy as a treatment for various health conditions.
